title: Deploy Request
description: Payload sent to Denholm (release agent) to trigger a production deployment

commitHash.description: SHA of the commit to deploy

testsPassedCount.description: Total number of automated tests that passed for this commit

browserE2EPassed.description: Whether the browser E2E (T5) gate passed

changeDescription.description: Human-readable description of what is being deployed

requestedBy.description: Agent name or 'human' that is requesting the deploy
